        {
            "family": "counsellingAdverseEvent",
            "fieldName": "Emotional Support",
            "id": "counsellingEmotionalSupport",
            "orderId": 1,
            "isSummary": true,

            "title": "Emotional Support",
            "titleCulture": "মানসিক সহায়তা",
            "visibility": "visible",
            "instructions":
            [
                "I am very sorry for your loss. I know this is an incredibly difficult time for you and your family. What you are feeling right now - whether it's sadness, anger, confusion, or numbness - all of these feelings are completely normal. There is no right or wrong way to grieve.",
                "It's important that you allow yourself to feel these emotions. Don't hold them inside. Talk to your partner, your family, or someone you trust about how you're feeling. Some days will be harder than others, and that's okay. Healing takes time, and everyone heals at their own pace.",
                "If you feel comfortable, you can also connect with other mothers who have experienced similar losses. There are support groups available that can help. And if you ever feel overwhelmed or need professional support, please don't hesitate to reach out. We are here to help you.",
                "Remember, seeking help is a sign of strength, not weakness. Your feelings matter, and you deserve support during this difficult time."
            ],
            "instructionsCulture":
            [
                "আমি আপনার ক্ষতির জন্য খুব দুঃখিত। আমি জানি এটি আপনার এবং আপনার পরিবারের জন্য একটি অবিশ্বাস্যভাবে কঠিন সময়। আপনি এখন যা অনুভব করছেন - তা দুঃখ, রাগ, বিভ্রান্তি বা অসাড়তা হোক - এই সমস্ত অনুভূতি সম্পূর্ণ স্বাভাবিক। শোক করার কোন সঠিক বা ভুল উপায় নেই।",
                "আপনার নিজের জন্য এই আবেগগুলো অনুভব করা গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। এগুলো ভিতরে রাখবেন না। আপনার সঙ্গী, পরিবার বা কাউকে বিশ্বাস করেন এমন কারো সাথে আপনার অনুভূতি সম্পর্কে কথা বলুন। কিছু দিন অন্যদের চেয়ে কঠিন হবে, এবং সেটা ঠিক আছে। নিরাময়ের জন্য সময় লাগে, এবং প্রত্যেকে নিজের গতিতে নিরাময় করে।",
                "আপনি যদি স্বাচ্ছন্দ্য বোধ করেন, আপনি অন্যান্য মায়েদের সাথেও সংযুক্ত হতে পারেন যারা অনুরূপ ক্ষতি অনুভব করেছেন। সহায়তা গোষ্ঠী উপলব্ধ যা সাহায্য করতে পারে। এবং যদি আপনি কখনও অভিভূত বোধ করেন বা পেশাদার সহায়তার প্রয়োজন হয়, অনুগ্রহ করে আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করতে দ্বিধা করবেন না। আমরা এখানে আপনাকে সাহায্য করার জন্য আছি।",
                "মনে রাখবেন, সাহায্য চাওয়া শক্তির লক্ষণ, দুর্বলতা নয়। আপনার অনুভূতি গুরুত্বপূর্ণ, এবং এই কঠিন সময়ে আপনি সহায়তার যোগ্য।"
            ]
        },

            "viewType": "Instruction",
            "isMandatory": false,
            "isEnabled": true,
            "title": "Future Pregnancy Planning",
            "titleCulture": "ভবিষ্যত গর্ভাবস্থার পরিকল্পনা",
            "visibility": "visible",
            "instructions":
            [
                "I know this may be difficult to think about right now, but I want to talk to you about family planning for your future health and wellbeing",
                "It's very important to wait at least 6 months before becoming pregnant again. Your body needs this time to heal completely, both physically and emotionally. Becoming pregnant too soon can increase risks for you and your future baby.",
                "To prevent pregnancy during this time, I recommend using a family planning method. We have several options available: IUD, contraceptive pills, injections, condoms, and other methods. We can discuss which method would work best for you based on your health and preferences. All of these methods are safe and effective.",
                "Remember, you can become pregnant again even before your periods return, so it's important to start family planning right away if you don't want to conceive immediately.",
                "When you and your family decide you're ready to try for another pregnancy, please come see us first. We'll make sure you're taking folic acid tablets, eating well, and managing any health conditions. We'll also help you register for antenatal care as early as possible in your next pregnancy - ideally within the first 3 months - so we can monitor you closely and ensure a healthy pregnancy."
            ],
            "instructionsCulture":
            [
                "আমি জানি এটি এখন ভাবতে কঠিন হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনার ভবিষ্যত স্বাস্থ্য এবং সুস্থতার জন্য পরিবার পরিকল্পনা সম্পর্কে কথা বলতে চাই",
                "আবার গর্ভবতী হওয়ার আগে কমপক্ষে 6 মাস অপেক্ষা করা খুবই গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। আপনার শরীরের এই সময় প্রয়োজন সম্পূর্ণভাবে নিরাময়ের জন্য, শারীরিক এবং মানসিক উভয়ভাবেই। খুব শীঘ্রই গর্ভবতী হওয়া আপনার এবং আপনার ভবিষ্যত শিশুর জন্য ঝুঁকি বাড়াতে পারে।",
                "এই সময়ে গর্ভাবস্থা প্রতিরোধ করতে, আমি একটি পরিবার পরিকল্পনা পদ্ধতি ব্যবহার করার পরামর্শ দিই। আমাদের কাছে বেশ কয়েকটি বিকল্প উপলব্ধ: IUD, গর্ভনিরোধক বড়ি, ইনজেকশন, কনডম এবং অন্যান্য পদ্ধতি। আমরা আপনার স্বাস্থ্য এবং পছন্দের উপর ভিত্তি করে কোন পদ্ধতিটি আপনার জন্য সবচেয়ে ভাল কাজ করবে তা নিয়ে আলোচনা করতে পারি। এই সমস্ত পদ্ধতি নিরাপদ এবং কার্যকর।",
                "মনে রাখবেন, আপনার মাসিক ফিরে আসার আগেও আপনি আবার গর্ভবতী হতে পারেন, তাই যদি আপনি অবিলম্বে গর্ভধারণ করতে না চান তবে পরিবার পরিকল্পনা শুরু করা গুরুত্বপূর্ণ।",
                "যখন আপনি এবং আপনার পরিবার সিদ্ধান্ত নেন যে আপনি আরেকটি গর্ভাবস্থার জন্য প্রস্তুত, অনুগ্রহ করে প্রথমে আমাদের দেখুন। আমরা নিশ্চিত করব যে আপনি ফলিক অ্যাসিড ট্যাবলেট গ্রহণ করছেন, ভাল খাচ্ছেন এবং কোন স্বাস্থ্য সমস্যা পরিচালনা করছেন। আমরা আপনার পরবর্তী গর্ভাবস্থায় যত তাড়াতাড়ি সম্ভব - আদর্শভাবে প্রথম 3 মাসের মধ্যে - প্রসবপূর্ব যত্নের জন্য নিবন্ধন করতে সাহায্য করব যাতে আমরা আপনাকে ঘনিষ্ঠভাবে পর্যবেক্ষণ করতে পারি এবং একটি সুস্থ গর্ভাবস্থা নিশ্চিত করতে পারি।"
            ]
        }
    ]
}

enrollment.consentForm:
Medtronic Labs SPICE™
Patient Consent and Notification Background:
Hypertension (also known as high blood pressure) and diabetes (also known as high blood sugar) are growing health concerns in Sub-Saharan Africa and across the world. You are being invited to participate in the Medtronic Labs SPICE™ Management program because you have hypertension or diabetes or both.
Managing your condition, attending clinic appointments, getting prescriptions filled, and being compliant with your medications and management plan can be challenging. It can also be difficult for your health care provider, such as your doctor, to track your blood pressure (BP) or blood glucose, health status, and medication information over time.
The Medtronic Labs SPICE™ program, uses a new method to improve clinical care for patients with hypertension and diabetes. This program seeks to track your BP and blood glucose data over time and to present it in an understandable way for your health care provider, empower you by providing more information about your hypertension and diabetes status, with the overall goals of providing improved care to reduce related complications and challenges.
Program Procedures
As a participant in this program, you will:
  • Be requested to visit the clinic/ hospital for enrollment into the program. You will be informed about the program and if you agree to participate, will be enrolled into the Medtronic Labs SPICE™ system.
  • Receive educational information about hypertension and diabetes.
  • Be asked to comply with the follow-up plan your health care provider provides you to the best of your ability:
  • Regularly have your BP and blood glucose checked , per your follow-up plan.
  • Attend hospital/ clinic medical reviews to see your health care provider, per your follow-up plan.
  • Receive and review short message service (SMS) messages with information from your health care provider.
Risk(s):
Risks associated with this program include delays or inaccurate information getting to your doctor or nurse that might potentially impact your care. To minimize this risk, we are using automated BP monitors and glucometers that are already approved to be purchased locally. All software being used has been carefully tested to make sure it is functioning as expected and is accurate. There are also checks in the system to ensure your information is being sent to your doctor.
In situations where you are instructed to go to the hospital/ clinic your doctor or nurse will be notified via SMS and will follow-up with you. In this regard, you are required to provide accurate contact information (i.e. telephone number) to your doctor and you will be required to inform your doctor in the event of any change of such contact information.
Benefit(s):
Patient and population benefits:
  • You may learn more about your condition and how to better your health status.
  • You will have access to regular BP and blood glucose measurements and will receive clear actionable information, which may help you in managing your hypertension and/ or diabetes.
  • Information collected from the program may be used to further benefit future similar patients or family members with hypertension, diabetes or heart disease
Confidentiality/ Use of Personal Information:
While participating in this program the following information will be collected:
  • identifying information (age, gender, phone number) and medical data and health information from you and from your medical records as prepared by your doctor including treatment and examination notes, and other health related information
  • You will be assigned a program ID that will be used for unique identification and to protect data privacy.
Your doctor, nurse, pharmacist, those checking your BP or blood glucose, and other designated parties that are involved in the program (for example those processing the program data) may have direct access to your personal information.
As an enrolled participant in the program, your personal information will be transferred to the United States as part of processing, with computing support from the software team in India. The program team will have your personal information processed manually or by computer, including the use of internet or of cloud computing. By enrolling in the program, you agree to the said transfer, storage and processing of your personal information. Data results from the program may be published but will not disclose your name or any other identifying characteristics. No personal information will be used to market to you without your consent.
Your de-identified medical information may also be used for additional research, educational purposes, publications, population health review, future health studies, development of new medical products or procedures, or for obtaining future approvals for health systems. In addition, the program team may also be required to disclose your personal information and health information if required by law or by a court order.
There is no patient portal to access your personal information collected as part of this program, but this information can be requested directly from your doctor or nurse.
The program will handle your personal information in accordance with appropriate confidentiality standards and all applicable data protection and privacy laws.
Participation:
Whether you take part in this program is up to you. If you choose to join the program, you may stop at any time, and this will not affect your current medical care.
Please notify your doctor or nurse if you would like to withdraw.
You may also choose not to answer any question you find uncomfortable or private during the program. There will be no consequence, loss of benefit or care to you if you choose to leave the program. Your collected data may be used as part of the program, unless you request otherwise.
Program team members from may reach out to you via SMS or calls to ask about your experience or in follow-up to missed assessment or medical reviews, as part of tele-counseling services. You may notify them if you wish to not receive any calls or SMS.
Compensation:
You will not receive any compensation for participating in this program.
SMS:
By signing up for the program, you are accepting to receive SMS messages used for communication of messages from your doctor or nurse, or instructions to pick up filled prescriptions. SMS messages from the software application will not be used for marketing purposes. If you wish to stop receiving the SMS messages, kindly inform your doctor or nurse.
Secondary use of data:
Your de-identified medical information may be combined with data from other program participants and used by the program team for research, marketing, or publication purposes, or to inform on the performance of the Medtronic Labs SPICE™ system.
Additionally, your de-identified medical information along with other patients’ may also be used by program stakeholders, such as the Ministry of Health and County/Regional Health teams, as part of their assessment of overall patient population health and to evaluate trends.
Identifying information will be removed from individual patient records before sharing with program stakeholders to protect patient privacy.
Consent for the secondary uses of program data is separate from your medical treatment and does not affect your care.
Contacts:
If you have any questions concerning this program, please do not hesitate to contact your doctor or nurse or support@medtroniclabs.org
Statement of the person giving consent:
I have read the information on this program or have had it translated into a language I understand. I have also talked it over to my satisfaction.
I understand that my participation is voluntary.
I know enough about the purpose, methods, risks, and benefits of the program to decide that I want to take part in it.
I understand that I may freely stop being part of this program at any time without having to explain myself.
I understand and agree that, as part of the program, the program team shall collect my personal information which may be disclosed to doctors, nurses, pharmacists, and BP/Glucose checkers, and other parties that are involved in the program as well as other third parties.
I understand that the program may be modified, amended, or terminated at any time with or without notice.
I understand and agree that the program team will store my personal information for a period of up to ten (10) years after the conclusion of the program.
If requested, I have received a copy of this consent and notification form to keep for myself.
The Healthcare worker will be accepting the above-mentioned Terms and Conditions on behalf of Screening Participant.
